paper_id: Weigand et al. - 2020 - An Ontology of IS Design Science Research Artefacts
input_limitations: The paper is a conceptual/theoretical contribution proposing an ontology of IS design science artefacts; it does not present a concrete model instance with stated functional goals in the sense of the taxonomy. It discusses modeling in general and classifies kinds of models, but no specific model with a quotable purpose statement is presented as the unit of analysis.
